LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF COOK COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT MOXY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO A JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,323.29 PLUS COSTS. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING, A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND SHOW COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Continued To Mar-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Cook Company Produce, Inc.'s motion for entry of judgment against Defendant Moxy is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment in its favor in the amount of $3,323.29 plus costs. Counsel for plaintiff is to provide a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling, a separate proposed judgment and show compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
